name: Baikida Carroll
abstract: Baikida Carroll (born January 15, 1947) is an American jazz trumpeter. Carroll studied at Southern Illinois University and at the Armed Forces School of Music.

concerts.label: Kool Jazz Festival: Charlie Haden's Liberation Music Orchestra/Philly Joe Jones' Dameronia

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] ...Special Edition. This one has new personnel. Baikida Carroll on trumpet... [INTERVIEWEE] Right, then I think we come back to Special Edition later.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
